name: Angry Birds: Slingshot Stories
overview: Ever wondered what happens before the Angry Birds climb into slingshots to rescue their eggs, or how all of those piggy structures are created? Where do pigs go when they're popped anyway? Finally, an animated series that gives us some answers to all of the big questions from the Angry Birds games. We all know the story - the piggies construct the levels, the birds break them to pieces. But what goes on behind the scenes to make that happen? What if a structure isn't completed before a level begins? What if the slingshot malfunctions? Tune in to Angry Birds Slingshot Stories for an animated series that goes inside your favorite game for an unexpected and hilarious perspective you never thought you'd see.

trailers.title: Trailer | Angry Birds Slingshot Stories Season 2!
